title: Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Jaipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions:
Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions!
